mapper.insert: INSERT INTO messages (conversation_id, sender_id, receiver_id, content, msg_type, is_read, sent_at) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, #{msgType}, #{isRead}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, conversation_id, sender_id, content, msg_type, is_read, sent_at FROM messages WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} ORDER BY sent_at ASC
SELECT id, conversation_id, sender_id, receiver_id, content, msg_type, is_read, sent_at FROM messages WHERE msg_type = 1 AND sender_id = #{senderId} ORDER BY sent_at DESC

SELECT m.id, m.conversation_id, m.sender_id, m.receiver_id, m.content, m.msg_type, m.is_read, m.sent_at FROM messages m WHERE m.receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND m.is_read = 0 AND m.sent_at = ( SELECT MAX(m2.sent_at) FROM messages m2 WHERE m2.conversation_id = m.conversation_id AND m2.receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND m2.is_read = 0 ) ORDER BY m.sent_at ASC

SELECT id, conversation_id, sender_id, receiver_id, content, msg_type, is_read, sent_at FROM messages WHERE msg_type = 1 ORDER BY (CASE WHEN JSON_EXTRACT(content, '$.pinned') = CAST('true' AS JSON) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END), sent_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
